elements.text:
You and your friends took some pictures together. The next day, you get a notification that they tagged you in a post on social media. You don't like how you look in the picture.

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I'm happy thinking about that memory.
I'm annoyed that this isn't a flattering picture of me.
I feel angry at my friend, but know that thety didn't know how I feel about the picture.
I'm insecure about how I look in the picture, but that was only one moment in time.
